title: taraxacum ohlsenii
intro: Taraxacum ohlsenii, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum ohlsenii include its ability to support liver function, aid in digestion, and help to reduce symptoms of allergies and fever. Taraxacum ohlsenii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the roots being used more frequently in herbal medicine for their more potent medicinal effects.
